title: Add missing database indexes on Event entity
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Columns event_type, start_ts, end_ts are used heavily in WHERE/ORDER BY clauses in EventsDao but lack @Index annotations in Event.kt:39. This forces full table scans on every query. Add composite and single-column indexes for these frequently filtered/sorted columns. This is likely the single biggest performance win in the codebase.
